Vibrating Gauntlets of Infuse  
 

Lore Item
Lore Group: Vibrating Gauntlet and Hammer of Infuse
Slot: HANDS
EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
AC: 23
STR: +10 STA: +10 WIS: +20 MANA: +50
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Transmute Hammer (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: ALL
Vibrating Gauntlets of Infuse
Lore Item
Lore Group: Vibrating Gauntlet and Hammer of Infuse
Slot: HANDS
EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
AC: 23
STR: +10 STA: +10 WIS: +20 MANA: +50
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Transmute Hammer (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Overking Bathezid's prized possession
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):115, 135, 200
Light:Stein of Tears
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:25 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:30371
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 10:12:46
Page Updated:Wed Aug 16th, 2023

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 25,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
King's Court Casino

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
Overking Bathezid


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Chardok
Shadow Haven
Lore Group: Vibrating Gauntlet and Hammer of Infuse
  • Vibrating Gauntlets of Infuse
  • Vibrating Hammer of Infuse
The effect destroys the gloves and creates a Vibrating Hammer of Infuse, which may be turned back into the gloves.


Uploaded February 27th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction

Post Comment
Gotten with a Golden Ticket 8/23
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2023 at 3:35 PM Rating: Good
PhantomStar
Sage
72 posts
I turned in a golden ticket today and got these. The tribute is nicer on the hammer.
▲ Page top
dropped in 2015
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2015 at 5:12 PM Rating: Good
khiron1416
11 posts
Just dropped
▲ Page top
dropped in 2015
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2015 at 5:43 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
khiron1416 wrote:
Just dropped


Allowishes wrote:
Just dropped off Overking Bathezid about 10 minutes ago.


LordNagafen wrote:
the rarest drop in Everquest. 41 Argent Protectors, 21 Incarnadine Breastplates, 7 Incarnadine Helmets, 2 Argent Defenders and 1 petition later, I finally got my Vibrating Gauntlets of Infuse. So for the curious, they do still drop, and the clicky effect does indeed work correctly. It takes five or so seconds for the game to generate the other item upon clicking, so don't panic - your item wasn't destroyed.

Definitely something I will treasure forever. *hugs the gauntlets*

By the way...wouldn't wearing these things get distracting as a spellcaster, what with your hands vibrating all over the place and disrupting your elegant handwaving and casting?


WickedLittleWoodElf the Tulip wrote:
Item works great, just dropped on FV


arkadykappa wrote:
Dropped 01/25/09 at 11am est.


Feias wrote:
Still dropping off the Overking. Obtained a pair on Nov 2005 -- was a fun shock to see them, I remember the days when clerics would fight over them because they were the best gauntlets in the game.


destef wrote:
Dropped on 7th hammer 5/12/04. Took my 3boxing crew down to the king. After waiting 4 hours for 2 other guilds to do thier raids (I usually step aside when a legitimate raid forms) I finally got my turn. I brought down a guild cleric to loot the scroll since I usually have to let them rot. I guess my karma was high from all my efforts that day cause the king dropped the gauntlets--finally. If I was keeping track correctly it was my 18th kill. 1 guants, 3 bp's, 14 swords. Sad part is that my cleric (who i was trying to get them for) has upgraded to more useful gauntlets than these by the time I finally got them. But I'm gonna hang on to them cause an item like this is more of a trophy than anything else. And this trophy is worth more to me than 100k.


Zhent wrote:
Dropped for me on 12/12/03. Was a nice bonus to go with my singed scroll. Haven't seen anyone else on Stromm with them yet, but I did get a tell from someone begging to buy them because he had been trying to get the Overking to drop them for a month. Heh, on Stromm these are worth 500K+ but I would never sell them. If and when I get time gear to replace it, it will go to the next cleric in line in the guild.


Quotes span 2003-2015 with about a 2 year gap on average. This suggests:

-The item has always been rare (very low drop % on the NPC loot table).
-When it was put on the Shadowhaven Casino loot list some have assumed it no longer dropped, which is not the case.

Thanks for confirming you got it in 2015 though, it encourages people trying for items when they see that someone else did happen to get it in more recent times.
▲ Page top
dropped in 2015
QuoteReply

352 posts
Just to keep it all up to date. Dropped for on AB, about 5 months back. Took quite a few kills, so yeah, silly low drop rate.

This is also available as one of the lore items you can get with a Gold Ticket in King's Court Casino if your server has the loyalty merchant and casino active

necro here got it last night at casino never even seen it but have on now on fv lol

Quite possibly
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2010 at 6:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592339345341
12 posts
the rarest drop in Everquest. 41 Argent Protectors, 21 Incarnadine Breastplates, 7 Incarnadine Helmets, 2 Argent Defenders and 1 petition later, I finally got my Vibrating Gauntlets of Infuse. So for the curious, they do still drop, and the clicky effect does indeed work correctly. It takes five or so seconds for the game to generate the other item upon clicking, so don't panic - your item wasn't destroyed.

Definitely something I will treasure forever. *hugs the gauntlets*

By the way...wouldn't wearing these things get distracting as a spellcaster, what with your hands vibrating all over the place and disrupting your elegant handwaving and casting?
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2009 at 3:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1596990055170
30 posts
Just had the same problem happen to me i clicked guantlets to summon hammer and they poofed with the duplicate lore message as well. apparently this has not been fixed.
▲ Page top
Guantlets poofed
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2009 at 1:02 PM Rating: Default
Boop
View User Forum
114 posts
I got this by turning in a gold ticket...sorta. What actually happened was the Gold Ticket went "poof", Duplicate Lore Items are not allowed.

So I /petition and report it. Day later, GM contacts me and tells me I was suppose to get the gloves, but he can see it went poof. I say, not what I wanted, but ok, hand em over.

So, I click it...the gloves... and once again "poof" Duplicate lore item not allowed. Not even gonna bother petitioning again.

They fixed it all right. Just be happy people who "fix" stuff at SoE aren't "fixing" stuff like airplanes you fly on or life support equipment or elevators or anything like that lol
▲ Page top
Still drops
QuoteReply

Lost!
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2008 at 2:03 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759155384
55 posts
I just got the gloves/hammer today. First time I clicked to trasmute them they POOFED and a red text message appeared saying, "Duplicate Lore items not allowed." That's it and they were GONE GONE GONE! Not in inventory, not on the ground. GONE! I petitioned. I'm not happy. I hope I get them back.

Edit: This has been fixed now.

Edited, Jan 16th 2009 4:01pm by qlipoth

Still drop
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2007 at 2:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591828180938
4 posts
After spending few weeks in casino trying to get gold ticket for DE illusion, I decided to make one casino drop "easy way" and camp the gloves.
I was max ally to sarnaks and with help of 70 rogue shroud got to king (I am 75 bst and could solo him easily).
Well... that was not so easy ... 46 kings about 10 BP..., few bags of Argent protectors... a stock of newbie spells ... and finally on the 46th king got the gloves :)

I am very happy now lol and yes it is still dropping....
▲ Page top
Still droppin'
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2006 at 9:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591898921053
40 posts
I won these last night.
A pickup raid went to Chardok, many people wiped on a bad pull, and proceeded to abandon the raid for Guild Lobby rezzes. So we pushed onward! At any rate, here's the important stuff:

70 Ranger, gear wasn't insanely good, but I wouldn't want to duel him =)
70 Rogue, completely uber, 2.0
70 Bard, completely uber, 2.0
70 Wizzy, no idea about caster gear
58 Warrior, decent gear
59 Rogue (me), Decent gear, 1.0

The 6 of us went through from the bridge (near the royals) all the way down to the hallway prior to the Royals in about 10 minutes. 70 Rogue ended with a bad pull, 5 mobs plus the echo of Chardok. The remaining 5 of us pulled the king, he dropped these. We then pulled the Queen and got the Warrior his epic piece. The Echo of Chardok proceeded to kill both me and the warrior with that 2kDD AoE (youch!) Our mission had been accomplished, along with this nice bit of loot, so we GL'ed the bodies.
▲ Page top

we just got them off the king tonight. had 4 groups with some heavy 65 star-power to get epic for guildy. very easy with that big a raid. took about 15 secs. Queen was harder.

# Jun 23 2004 at 2:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342124249
3 posts
The gloves dropped on Mith Marr on 6/9 I about fell out of my chair when I went to loot the scroll and saw those too. Im having freakish luck with the cleric epic mobs we also had a cloak of flames drop from Ixi and with Ragefire being all I have left now Im hoping it continues.

Kabriel 51 Vicar Mithaniel Marr
▲ Page top
7th hammer 5/12/04
QuoteReply
# May 19 2004 at 8:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772345232
139 posts
Dropped on 7th hammer 5/12/04. Took my 3boxing crew down to the king. After waiting 4 hours for 2 other guilds to do thier raids (I usually step aside when a legitimate raid forms) I finally got my turn. I brought down a guild cleric to loot the scroll since I usually have to let them rot. I guess my karma was high from all my efforts that day cause the king dropped the gauntlets--finally. If I was keeping track correctly it was my 18th kill. 1 guants, 3 bp's, 14 swords. Sad part is that my cleric (who i was trying to get them for) has upgraded to more useful gauntlets than these by the time I finally got them. But I'm gonna hang on to them cause an item like this is more of a trophy than anything else. And this trophy is worth more to me than 100k.
▲ Page top
Hammer time
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2004 at 6:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
Summons the Vibrating Hammer of Infuse.



Edited, Wed Apr 21 07:49:40 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Hammer time
QuoteReply
# May 03 2004 at 5:09 AM Rating: Default
Tuluvar
View User Forum
352 posts
It doesnt summon a hammer, it transforms the gloves into a hammer. Big difference.
____________________________
Tuluvar
▲ Page top
RE: Hammer time
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2004 at 11:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
Effect: Transmute Hammer
1: Summon Item: Vibrating Hammer of Infuse

It does summon the hammer, just that the summoning item is classed as EXPENDABLE: Charges 1, so happens to disappear once the hammer is summoned.

Edited, Thu Jun 3 00:37:36 2004
▲ Page top
The Hammer
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2004 at 10:07 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591771380243
Scholar
24 posts
The hammer isn't too bad either. The gloves effect changes the glove into the following hammer:

Vibrating Hammer of Infuse
Slot: PRIMARY
Damage: 25 Delay: 35 Damage Bonus: 38 (lvl 65)
AC: +8 Str: +20 Sta: +10 Wis: +10 Fire Resist: +5 Disease Resist: +5 Cold Resist: +5 Magic Resist: +5 Poison Resist: +5 HP: +100
Weapon Skill: Two Hand Blunt
Classes: Cleric
Races: All Races

The clicky effect on the hammer is called "Transmute Gloves" and converts the hammer back into the gloves.

Dropped for me on 12/12/03. Was a nice bonus to go with my singed scroll. Haven't seen anyone else on Stromm with them yet, but I did get a tell from someone begging to buy them because he had been trying to get the Overking to drop them for a month. Heh, on Stromm these are worth 500K+ but I would never sell them. If and when I get time gear to replace it, it will go to the next cleric in line in the guild.
